user.title: Select Device
user.description: Select a PoolPal device to add a water level sensor to.

configure.title: Configure Sensor
configure.description: Choose the source entity ending in _value, then set the formula: cm = a·raw² + b·raw + c.

data_description.source_entity: The entity on this device that provides the raw _value
data_description.offset: Constant term (c) in a·raw² + b·raw + c
data_description.linear_coefficient: Linear coefficient (b) in a·raw² + b·raw + c
data_description.quad_coefficient: Quadratic coefficient (a) in a·raw² + b·raw + c
data_description.name: Friendly name for the water level sensor

error.invalid_state: The selected entity does not have a valid numeric state.
error.unknown_device: Selected device was not found in the device registry.

abort.no_devices: No PoolPal devices were found in the Home Assistant device registry.
abort.no_entities: No entities ending in _value were found on the selected device.

init.title: Configure PoolPal Sensor
init.description: Adjust the formula: cm = a·raw² + b·raw + c.

data_description.offset: Constant term (c) in a·raw² + b·raw + c
data_description.linear_coefficient: Linear coefficient (b) in a·raw² + b·raw + c
data_description.quad_coefficient: Quadratic coefficient (a) in a·raw² + b·raw + c
